meaning: adj.可以忍受的,足可支撑的,养得起的,
examples: The creation of an efficient and sustainable transport system is critical.
The farming methods of ants are at least sustainable.
We've talked recently about the importance of sustainable energy.
Loyalty can bring just as good results as fear or greed, and probably more sustainable growth.
They play a central role in sustainable development by supplying all our fresh water.
